title: **💎 Relic Analyst**
description: Allows the Prophet to scan value fluctuations across multiple simulations and receive projections when the algorithm detects anomalies.
user_flows_1: Select the simulation in which you wish to focus my optics.
user_flows_2: Navigate the parameters to mark the artifacts your soul desires to track.
task_map_1: Artifacts: The database keeps historical values synchronized.
task_map_2: Projections: You will receive a pulse in the network when probability advises acquisition or divestment.
admin_flows_1: Delve into the modules to energize and calibrate their fundamental functions.

poe2.title: 💎 **Anomalies in Path of Exile 2** 👺
poe2.description: Deploy my sensors to observe the market and predict the destiny of objects
poe2.league_description: Available space-time cycles and the most resonant anomalies of the moment are displayed.
